subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Beloved, Who hath unlocked the gate of reunion and attainment through the key of His Most Great Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوبی را شایسته و سزاست که باب وصل و لقا را بمفتاح اسم اعظمش باز نمود
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @unity; oneness of humanity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat], @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
